SEQUENCE.COMMENT: fwEventService - this service is triggered by the broker via fwEventTrigger

Values.value: DOCARRIVED sender (%senderAlias% tp=%senderIID%) receiver (%receiverAlias% tp=%receiverIID%) %docType% (%docSubtype%) wf=%workflowIID% t=%sTraceTransID% d=%docID%)
DOCFAILED sender (%senderAlias% tp=%senderIID%) receiver (%receiverAlias% tp=%receiverIID%) %docType% (%docSubtype%) wf=%workflowIID% t=%sTraceTransID% d=%docID%)
DOCDELIVERED sender (%senderAlias% tp=%senderIID%) receiver (%receiverAlias% tp=%receiverIID%) %docType% (%docSubtype%) wf=%workflowIID% t=%sTraceTransID% d=%docID%)

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Invalid event operation '%sEventOp%' - envelope dropped - envelope is: %xmldata%

Values.value: FE0000 Invalid event operation '%sEventOp%' - envelope dropped - envelope is: %xmldata%
